item.text: I’ll compute the aggregates from the CSV, generate both files, then validate the exact structural and wording constraints.
The dataset has 30 orders, so I’m handling the even-count median by averaging the two middle per-order revenues before rounding. This edge case is reflected in the output value.

item.text: Created [REPORT.md](/tmp/arena-ws.gVwEAD/REPORT.md:1) and [summary.json](/tmp/arena-ws.gVwEAD/summary.json:1). The even-order median edge case is documented and handled at [REPORT.md](/tmp/arena-ws.gVwEAD/REPORT.md:3).
